name: XMReality AB (publ)
summary: XMReality AB (publ) develops and sells solutions for knowledge sharing through augmented reality (AR) in Sweden and internationally. The company offers XMReality Remote Guidance, which is used to guide onsite staff to enable quick dispositions, resolutions, and/or problem prevention. XMReality AB (publ) was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Link√É¬∂ping, Sweden.
